metadata.name: Grant With Feedback (Auto Pay via Actions)
metadata.author: Agreements Protocol
metadata.description: Variant of grant-with-feedback-auto-pay that defines a human-readable on-chain payment action in execution.actions, compiled and installed at agreement initialization.

grantorEthAddress.name: Grantor Address
grantorEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the granting party

recipientEthAddress.name: Recipient Address
recipientEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the recipient party

workTokenAddress.name: Work Token (ERC-20) Address
workTokenAddress.description: ERC-20 token contract used for payment

paymentAmount.name: Payment Amount
paymentAmount.description: Amount of work tokens to pay on work acceptance

grantorName.name: Grantor Name
grantorName.description: Legal name of the granting party

grantorSignature.name: Grantor Signature
grantorSignature.description: Digital signature of the granting party

recipientName.name: Recipient Name
recipientName.description: Legal name of the recipient party

recipientSignature.name: Recipient Signature
recipientSignature.description: Digital signature of the recipient party

effectiveDate.name: Effective Date
effectiveDate.description: The date when this grant becomes effective

scope.name: Scope of Cooperation
scope.description: The scope of cooperation between the parties

content.data:
# GRANT AGREEMENT (AUTO PAY VIA ACTIONS)

This is a demo variant where payment is an on-chain action installed at agreement initialization and executed atomically upon work acceptance.

AWAITING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.name: Awaiting Template Variables
AWAITING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.description: Grantor needs to fill out the template variables.

AWAITING_RECIPIENT_SIGNATURE.name: Pending Recipient Signature
AWAITING_RECIPIENT_SIGNATURE.description: This state awaits until Recipient signing the agreement.

AWAITING_GRANTOR_SIGNATURE.name: Pending Grantor Signature
AWAITING_GRANTOR_SIGNATURE.description: This state awaits Grantor's final acceptance of Recipient's data.

AWAITING_WORK_SUBMISSION.name: Awaiting Work Submission
AWAITING_WORK_SUBMISSION.description: The agreement has been accepted by both parties. Awaiting work submission.

WORK_IN_REVIEW.name: Work In Review
WORK_IN_REVIEW.description: The work has been submitted by recipient and is now awaiting grantor review.

WORK_ACCEPTED_AND_PAID.name: Grant Payment Fulfilled
WORK_ACCEPTED_AND_PAID.description: The work has been submitted, reviewed, accepted, and payment has been executed.

REJECTED.name: Agreement Rejected
REJECTED.description: The agreement has been rejected by Grantor and will not proceed.

initialize.name: Initialize Grant
initialize.description: Initialize the grant with grantor/recipient addresses and payment parameters

grantorData.description: Grantor fills in terms, including scope, duration, and effective date.

recipientSigning.description: Signature from Recipient accepting the grant terms.

grantorSigning.description: Signature from Grantor accepting grant terms.

grantorRejection.description: Grantor rejects grant terms with a reason.

workSubmission.description: Recipient submits completed work for review.

submissionHash.name: Submission Hash
submissionHash.description: Hash of the work submission content

submissionUrl.name: Submission URL
submissionUrl.description: URL to access the submitted work content

workAccepted.description: Grantor accepts the submitted work and provides comments.

acceptanceComments.name: Acceptance Comments
acceptanceComments.description: Grantor's comments on the accepted work

workResubmissionRequested.description: Grantor requests changes to submitted work.

resubmissionReason.name: Resubmission Reason
resubmissionReason.description: Reason why work needs to be resubmitted

rejectionReason.name: Rejection Reason
rejectionReason.description: Reason for rejecting the submitted work
